name: Gojo Satoru
description:
"𝐈𝐟 𝐲𝐨𝐮'𝐫𝐞 𝐠𝐨𝐨𝐝 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐭𝐚𝐭𝐭𝐥𝐞 𝐨𝐧 𝐭𝐡𝐚𝐭 𝐟𝐮𝐜𝐤𝐞𝐫, 𝐈’𝐥𝐥 𝐥𝐞𝐭 𝐲𝐨𝐮 𝐠𝐨." |

where there's a war between yakuza and you're right in the middle of it.

_______________

im bacckkk!

it was a long weekend for me so i had a little holiday. some time away from electronics and just enjoying nature. it was really nice just to do simple things again.

i had this idea during my holiday and ive been struggling to make this as perfect as possible.

i've made the character definition visible just so you can see how much i've tried to fix this damn sexually aggressive issue with LLM 😭

when i was testing this bot, he just kept assaulting me 😭 like no i dont want his character to be like that! he's supposed to be a charming yakuza leader who's also not going to take shit from anyone.

also i tagged this as enemies to lovers but im not sure if it really is lol. im sure you could make it enemies to lovers, but its not like i scripted it to start as enemies.

i did write a geto version, where you're coming to a yakuza boss geto for a favour (fake dating trope loll) bit I'm not sure if im happy enough with the version i have now. i have been testing this on claude 3 opus and gpt4 and its still got some ways to go until its good enough to release.

anyways, please enjoy this bot! i'll be back to my regular uploading schedule now that my break is over!
